{{CargoRelic
|name=Playbook
|class_id=20964
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This looks like an ordinary notebook, but it’s actually a 13th-generation secret playbook—packed with real-world tactics to become a love guru. Legend says even skimming a page will make people chase you.
[Excerpts]"They throw themselves at me—what can I do?"
"Flirt with the ex, entertain the current… but save room for the upgrade."
|fame=28
|art=13
|fth=14
|civ=18
|tech=17
|ss1=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +4<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +8<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +12<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +12<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +12<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
